reviews.comment: Very nice experience in booking with WanderNest! They have a very helpful and cooperative staff. I will definitely booking again with them.
Very good experience!! Will again book with WanderNest

We booked the full-day heritage tour and it exceeded all expectations. The agency handled every single detail—from the air-conditioned transport to booking skip-the-line tickets at the busiest spots. Our guide didn't just rattle off facts; they told captivating stories that brought the history to life. The lunch spot they chose was also incredible, serving authentic local food instead of typical tourist traps. Will definitely book through them again on our next trip.

tour.name: Al Ain Full-Day Tour
tour.overview: Experience the wonders of Al Ain on a guided day tour from Abu Dhabi. Explore its iconic landmarks, lush oases, and the breathtaking views from Jebel Hafeet. Visit the vibrant camel market, unwind at natural hot springs, and immerse yourself in the city’s rich cultural heritage. The tour includes entry tickets and a delicious international buffet.
tour.highlights:
Experience the perfect blend of nature and city life in Al Ain.
Discover historical gems like Al Jahili Fort and Qasr Al Muwaiji.
Stroll through lush oases and admire the traditional falaj irrigation system.
Ascend Jebel Hafeet Mountain for panoramic views and visit the bustling camel market.
Explore the Al Ain Oasis and soak in the charm of the UAE’s renowned Garden City.
tour.know_before_you_go: Luggage or large bags are not allowed.

tour.name: Burj Khalifa Tour Dubai
tour.overview: Witness the views over Dubai from the observation deck of the iconic Burj Khalifa, the world's tallest building. Ascend to the 124th and 125th floors for a panoramic 360-degree view over the Arabian Gulf.
tour.highlights:
Zip up the fastest elevators on the planet to reach the 124th floor of the Burj Khalifa for stunning views of the Dubai skyline.
Level up your Dubai trip (literally!) with a visit to the 124 and 125 floors of the Burj Khalifa.
The observation deck with floor-to-ceiling windows on the 124th floor gives you 360° views of the Arabian Gulf.
The 125th floor ups the ante with an open-air terrace. And don't miss the exquisite Mashrabiya motifs – a tribute to Arab arts and culture.
For a luxurious and personalized experience with shorter wait times, upgrade to Sky Lounge access on the 148th floor. You can also include a visit to the Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo.
Fun Fact: The Burj Khalifa features the world's fastest elevator that travels at 10 meters per second, reaching the top in less than a minute.

tour_options.name: At The Top + Sunrise + Morning Treat
tour_options.inclusions:
Admission tickets to 124 & 125 Floors of the Burj Khalifa.
Access to the telescopes on the observation deck.
The entire At the Top experience is wheelchair accessible.
Free admission for children under 3.

tour_options.name: At The Top (Level 124 - 125)
tour_options.note:
<b>Non Prime Time<b> - 7 AM to 11.30 AM & 8:30 PM to 11 PM
<b>Prime Time<b> - 12 PM to 8 PM
tour_options.inclusions:
Entry ticket for the selected time and floor
Use of the viewing telescopes
Wi-fi

tour.name: National Aquarium, Abu Dhabi
tour.overview: Dive into the wonders of the National Aquarium of Abu Dhabi, home to 35,000 aquatic animals across 10 zones, including the longest underwater tunnel. In addition to being designed on an epic scale, the National Aquarium is also home to over 35,000 aquatic animals from 300+ species of fish, birds, amphibians, arachnids, and reptiles. The National Aquarium is part of the overall vision of Al Qana which reflects Abu Dhabi’s Vision 2030.
tour.highlights:
Discover the 10 natural zones including UAE’s Natural Treasures, Red Sea Wreck, Atlantic Cave, Ocean Magic, and Frozen Ocean at Al Qana National Aquarium Abu Dhabi
Get up close with 200+ sharks at the aquarium at the biggest aquarium in Abu Dhabi.
Learn more about the underwater world and explore rare species you have never seen before including the Abu Dhabi aquarium snake at the biggest fish aquarium in Abu Dhabi.
tour.age_health_restrictions:
The experience is restricted for guests aged 1 and under.
The experience is not accessible for wheelchair users, people with mobility issues, and pregnant women.
Entry is free for guests with a disability pass.
Children aged 12 and under must be accompanied by an adult aged 16 and above.

tour.name: Rustar Dhow Cruise, Dubai
tour.overview: The RUSTAR DHOW CRUISE located in DEIRA CREEK is a Royal Boat that can accommodate 450 passengers. At 51 meter ( 167 ft ) It has set the world record for the LARGEST FLOATING RESTAURANT. The RUSTAR DHOW CRUISE has three (3) levels. - LOWER LEVER called MAJILIS is used for private parties or used as a dance floor ( upon request ). - MIDDLE LEVEL which is AC DECK for groups and dinner hall. - UPPER DECK which is an open area and dinner deck.
tour.highlights:
Experience the world's biggest dinner show cruise with panoramic views of Dubai from Deira Creek.
Indulge in a lavish buffet of international and local specialties on board.
Enjoy authentic folk dance demonstrations such as yowla and tanoura during the cruise.
Get the chance to have a henna tattoo and enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi service.
Be serenaded by a live singer for added entertainment.
tour.know_before_you_go:
3 years below free
4 years above same price
NOTE: Cancelation, policy no refundable no cancellation before four hours of boarding time on the same day
Cancellation On the Spot is not accepted. Will be full charges to the guest acknowledgement

tour.highlights:
Discover over 3,000 unique plants and animals within the bio-dome.
Embark on a journey to explore Earth’s diverse flora and fauna, bringing the tropics to life.
Immerse yourself in the captivating beauty of a lush, tropical rainforest environment.

tour.name: Deep Dive Dubai
tour.overview: Deep Dive Dubai is a 60-metre deep diving pool in Dubai containing 14,000,000 liters of fresh water, it is the deepest swimming pool in the world. Make a splash as you go scuba diving in the world's deepest indoor swimming pool. Enjoy an experience suitable for those who have never dived before as you discover an underwater city with your guide.
tour.highlights:
Up to the highest depths of 10 meters, 18 meters, or 30 meters.
Discover the various areas of our underwater city.
One of our qualified dive guides is included in every experience.
tour.age_health_restrictions:
For any health issue, a medical clearance form from a doctor is required.
This tour is not suitable for non-swimmers, people with pre-existing medical conditions, divers without certification and children under 10 years.
Scuba diving certification (or image of it) from a recognized agency must be presented.
All alcohol or non-prescription drugs must be avoided at least 24 hours before diving.
tour.know_before_you_go: Flying or high altitude (i.e. Burj Khalifa) must be avoided at least 12 hours after diving (unless more than one dive in which case person must wait at least 18 hours).

tour.name: Parasailing in Dubai
tour.overview: The thrilling experience of parasailing in Dubai is the best way to be introduced to this sport of flying.  Enhances the thrill element of your Dubai vacation and get an unforgettable cityscape by flying above 250 meters from the water level. We offer an outstanding parasailing service that you should definitely include in your Dubai tour.
tour.highlights:
Soar up to 250 meters above the Arabian Gulf for breathtaking aerial views of Dubai.
Witness iconic landmarks like Burj Al Arab and Palm Jumeirah from a unique vantage point.
Add an exhilarating adventure to your Dubai vacation with safe and guided parasailing experiences.
Perfect for thrill-seekers and those looking to capture unforgettable moments.
Enjoy smooth take-offs and landings with top-notch equipment and professional crew.
tour.age_health_restrictions:
For safety reasons, infants under the age of 2 year are not permitted on board our boats.
This tour is suitable for people from 6 to 80 years of age.
The maximum weight of all participants together should be 180kg (400 Pounds).
tour.know_before_you_go:
You should anticipate or expect canceling a parasailing session, even if participants are present at the location, when adverse weather conditions like strong winds, rain, or wind gusts pose risks to safety.
This tour/activity will have a maximum of 12 travelers.
Participants should be aware that, in the event of unforeseen mechanical issues or adverse weather conditions, an emergency landing may be necessary for safety reasons, and this could involve landing in the water. Participants are expected to comply with crew instructions during such situations to ensure a secure outcome.

tour.name: Dubai Safari Park
tour.overview: Have a unique wildlife experience at Dubai Safari Park, a sprawling sanctuary that hosts around 3,000 animals in habitats designed to replicate their natural environment.
tour.highlights:
Discover the African savannah and Arabian desert in the park's themed villages, where animals thrive in settings designed to mimic their natural habitats. 
Enjoy engaging activities like animal feeding sessions and educational talks, or opt for the Explorer Safari Tour to experience close-up encounters with animals from the comfort of a bus.
tour.age_health_restrictions:
Children under 3 years are free of charge. An identity card is required upon entry.
Children between 3-12 years must be accompanied by an adult.
tour.know_before_you_go:
The following are not allowed: flash photography, drones, skateboards, food, bikes, scooters, pets (except assistance dogs), smoking, and vaping.
Admission includes a 15-minute Safari Tour in the Arabian Desert Zone, as well as access to three live animal presentations, complimentary animal feeding or encounters (excluding paid options), wildlife talks, and Young Explorers workshops, all based on the announced schedule.
The complimentary animal feeding and encounters include the Alwada Pony Walk, Duck Feeding, and Bird Feeding. All other feeding and encounters are available for an additional cost and can be purchased at the park’s ticketing counter.
Check the official website for the daily opening hours, as well as presentation and feeding schedules, before your visit.

meta_details.meta_keywords: Dubai Safari Park,Dubai Zoo,Dubai Children Places to Visit

Marvel at the exquisite Arabian craftsmanship showcased throughout the palace and gardens.
Dive into centuries of knowledge through ancient manuscripts, books, and folios, highlighting the Arabic world’s contributions to global knowledge.
Gain insight into the rulers and institutions that shaped the UAE's journey and progress.

Pets, and large bags are not allowed.

meta_details.meta_keywords: Yellow Boat Sightseeing Tour Dubai,Dubai Sightseeing tours,Dubai speedboat tours,dubai skyline cruise,atlantis sightseeing tour,plam jumeirah tour,burj al arab boat sightseeing tour
meta_details.meta_description: Hop aboard the iconic Yellow Boat for an exciting speedboat adventure in Dubai. Cruise across the open waters and enjoy stunning views of Dubai’s skyline, with sights like Atlantis, Palm Jumeirah, and the Burj Al Arab appearing in the distance. Discover the city from a unique perspective and create unforgettable memories.

tour.name: SeaWorld, Abu Dhabi
tour.overview: With over 100 animal experiences and presentations, including up-close animal encounters and expeditions, you’ll be able to learn about the incredible One Ocean that connects all of us. SeaWorld is home to over 35 interactive experiences and rides, live characters and performances, 17 dining options, 13 retail outlets, and roaming entertainment across all realms.
tour.highlights:
Watch a variety of shark species in a controlled and safe environment.
Experience a variety of rides at SeaWorld Park including the Atlantis water ride which takes you on a journey through a mythical underwater city. 
Visitors can expect to see a variety of marine creatures and acrobats and learn about the importance of marine conservation and protection.
